column1: # LINE SENSOR SCIENTIFIC ANALYSIS
# Press BUTTON A to begin Phase 1 (Shade Test)
# === PHASE 1: SHADE TEST (25 Shades of Gray) ===
# Place centre sensor over shade patch 1 (black).
# Press B to capture readings.  Press A when done to skip to Phase 2.
# HEADER: shade_id
# Shade 1/25 complete.  Move to next patch
# Shade 2/25 complete.  Move to next patch
# Shade 3/25 complete.  Move to next patch
# Shade 4/25 complete.  Move to next patch

# Shade 25/25 complete.  Move to next patch
# --- Phase 1 complete (all shades captured) ---
# === PHASE 2: GRADIENT TEST ===
# Place robot at black end of gradient strip.
# Push robot slowly along gradient.
# Press B to start logging
# Press A when done to skip to Phase 3.
# HEADER: gradient_id
# Gradient 1 — logging started.  Push robot now.  Press B to stop.
# Gradient 1 — logging stopped.  Reposition robot
# Gradient 2 — logging started.  Push robot now.  Press B to stop.
# Gradient 2 — logging stopped.  Reposition robot
# Gradient 3 — logging started.  Push robot now.  Press B to stop.
# Gradient 3 — logging stopped.  Reposition robot
# Gradient 4 — logging started.  Push robot now.  Press B to stop.
# Gradient 4 — logging stopped.  Reposition robot
# Gradient 5 — logging started.  Push robot now.  Press B to stop.
# Gradient 5 — logging stopped.  Reposition robot
# --- Phase 2 complete (skipped to Phase 3) ---
# === PHASE 3: THIN LINE TEST ===
# Place robot ~75mm before the thin line
# facing perpendicular to the line.
# Press B to start automated drive sequence.
# Press A to finish.
# HEADER: pass_id
# --- Phase 3 complete ---
# ALL TESTS COMPLETE
# Disconnect serial
